---
title: "Project Phase 1 Analaysis"
author: "Korlapati Keerthana"
date: "05/3/2026"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: yes
  html_document:
    toc: yes
    toc_float: yes
---
### Experiment 1: Both Item and Task

```{r}
# Both Task and Item- Task
library(tidyverse)

# SET PATH
base_path <- "Both_item_task"

task_path <- file.path(base_path, "both_data")

# FIND TASK FILES
task_files <- list.files(
  path = task_path,
  pattern = "_MST_task_.*\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

cat("Number of TASK files found:", length(task_files), "\n")

# LOAD + CLEAN FUNCTION
load_task_clean <- function(file_path) {
  
  df <- suppressMessages(
    read_csv(
      file_path,
      show_col_types = FALSE,
      name_repair = "unique"
    )
  )
  
  participant_id <- substr(basename(file_path), 1, 5)
  
  # Create missing columns if they don't exist
  if(!"trials.key_resp_9.rt" %in% names(df)) {
    df$trials.key_resp_9.rt <- NA
  }
  
  if(!"trials.key_resp_8.rt" %in% names(df)) {
    df$trials.key_resp_8.rt <- NA
  }
  
  df_clean <- df %>%
    
    filter(!is.na(trials.thisN)) %>%
    
    select(
      image_path,
      trials.thisN,
      trials.key_resp_9.rt,
      trials.key_resp_8.rt
    ) %>%
    
    mutate(
      participant_id = participant_id,
      trial_number = trials.thisN + 1,
      
      trials.key_resp_9.rt = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(trials.key_resp_9.rt)),
      trials.key_resp_8.rt = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(trials.key_resp_8.rt)),
      
      rt = case_when(
        !is.na(trials.key_resp_9.rt) ~ trials.key_resp_9.rt * 1000,
        !is.na(trials.key_resp_8.rt) ~ (3 + trials.key_resp_8.rt) * 1000,
        TRUE ~ NA_real_
      ),
      
      event_position = ((trial_number - 1) %% 7) + 1,
      
      boundary_position = case_when(
        event_position == 1 ~ "Post",
        event_position == 7 ~ "Pre",
        TRUE ~ "Non"
      ),
      
      image_name = basename(image_path)
    )
  
  return(df_clean)
}

# APPLY TO ALL FILES
df_both_task <- map_dfr(task_files, load_task_clean)

# SANITY CHECKS
cat("Unique participants:", length(unique(df_both_task$participant_id)), "\n")
table(df_both_task$boundary_position)
summary(df_both_task$rt)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# Both Task and Item- Test
test_files <- list.files(
  path = task_path,
  pattern = "_MST_test_.*\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

cat("Number of TEST files found:", length(test_files), "\n")

# LOAD + CLEAN FUNCTION
load_test_clean <- function(file_path) {

  df <- suppressMessages(
    read_csv(file_path,
             show_col_types = FALSE,
             name_repair = "unique")
  )

  df_clean <- df %>%
    
    # keep only actual test trials
    filter(!is.na(trials.thisN)) %>%
    
    select(
      image_path,
      trials.thisN,
      trials.key_resp_3.keys,
      trials.key_resp_3.rt,
      position_of_stimuli,
      participant
    ) %>%
    
    mutate(
      participant_id = participant,
      trial_number = trials.thisN + 1,
      image_name = basename(image_path),

      stimulus_type = case_when(
        str_detect(image_name, "^Foils") ~ "Foil",
        str_detect(image_name, "b\\.jpg$") ~ "Lure",
        str_detect(image_name, "a\\.jpg$") ~ "Target",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),

      response_type = case_when(
        trials.key_resp_3.keys == "o" ~ "Old",
        trials.key_resp_3.keys == "s" ~ "Similar",
        trials.key_resp_3.keys == "n" ~ "New",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    )

  return(df_clean)
}

# APPLY TO ALL FILES
df_both_test <- map_dfr(test_files, load_test_clean)

# CHECK
cat("Unique participants:", length(unique(df_both_test$participant_id)), "\n")
table(df_both_test$stimulus_type)

```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

############################################
# Reaction time by boundary condition
############################################

rt_summary <- df_both_task %>%
  group_by(boundary_position) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_rt = mean(rt, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_rt = sd(rt, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n()
  )

print(rt_summary)
```

```{r}
ggplot(df_both_task,
       aes(x = boundary_position, y = rt, fill = boundary_position)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, fill = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Encoding Reaction Time by Boundary Condition",
    x = "Boundary Position",
    y = "Reaction Time (ms)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

```{r}
############################################
# Join boundary position with test trials
############################################

encoding_lookup <- df_both_task %>%
  select(participant_id, trial_number, boundary_position)

df_analysis <- df_both_test %>%
  left_join(encoding_lookup,
            by = c("participant_id", "trial_number"))

df_analysis <- df_analysis %>%
  filter(stimulus_type %in% c("Target", "Lure"))

df_analysis <- df_analysis %>%
  mutate(
    correct = case_when(
      stimulus_type == "Target" & response_type == "Old" ~ 1,
      stimulus_type == "Lure" & response_type == "Similar" ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    )
  )

anova_model <- aov(
  correct ~ boundary_position * stimulus_type,
  data = df_analysis
)

summary(anova_model)
```

```{r}
############################################
# Compute probabilities
############################################

participant_probs <- df_both_test %>%
  group_by(participant_id) %>%
  summarise(
    p_old_target = mean(stimulus_type == "Target" & response_type == "Old"),
    p_old_foil = mean(stimulus_type == "Foil" & response_type == "Old"),
    p_similar_lure = mean(stimulus_type == "Lure" & response_type == "Similar"),
    p_similar_foil = mean(stimulus_type == "Foil" & response_type == "Similar"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

mst_metrics <- participant_probs %>%
  mutate(
    REC = p_old_target - p_old_foil,
    LDI = p_similar_lure - p_similar_foil
  )

print(mst_metrics)
```


```{r}
rm_data <- df_analysis %>%
  group_by(participant_id, boundary_position) %>%
  summarise(
    accuracy = mean(correct),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

library(afex)

rm_anova <- aov_ez(
  id = "participant_id",
  dv = "accuracy",
  data = rm_data,
  within = "boundary_position"
)

print(rm_anova)
```

```{r}
ggplot(rm_data,
       aes(x = boundary_position,
           y = accuracy,
           fill = boundary_position)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, fill = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Memory Accuracy Across Boundary Conditions",
    x = "Boundary Condition",
    y = "Accuracy"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

### Experiment 2: Only Item
```{r}
# Item Only - Task
library(tidyverse)

item_base_path <- "item_only"
item_task_path <- file.path(item_base_path, "item_only_data")

############################################
# FIND TASK FILES
############################################

item_task_files <- list.files(
  path = item_task_path,
  pattern = "_MST_task_.*\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

cat("Number of ITEM TASK files:", length(item_task_files), "\n")

############################################
# LOAD + CLEAN TASK FILES
############################################

load_item_task <- function(file_path){

  df <- suppressMessages(
    read_csv(file_path, show_col_types = FALSE, name_repair = "unique")
  )

  participant_id <- substr(basename(file_path),1,5)

  if(!"trials.key_resp_9.rt" %in% names(df)) df$trials.key_resp_9.rt <- NA
  if(!"trials.key_resp_8.rt" %in% names(df)) df$trials.key_resp_8.rt <- NA

  df %>%
    filter(!is.na(trials.thisN)) %>%
    select(image_path,
           trials.thisN,
           trials.key_resp_9.rt,
           trials.key_resp_8.rt) %>%
    mutate(
      participant_id = participant_id,
      trial_number = trials.thisN + 1,

      trials.key_resp_9.rt = as.numeric(trials.key_resp_9.rt),
      trials.key_resp_8.rt = as.numeric(trials.key_resp_8.rt),

      rt = case_when(
        !is.na(trials.key_resp_9.rt) ~ trials.key_resp_9.rt * 1000,
        !is.na(trials.key_resp_8.rt) ~ (3 + trials.key_resp_8.rt) * 1000,
        TRUE ~ NA_real_
      ),

      event_position = ((trial_number-1) %% 7) + 1,

      boundary_position = case_when(
        event_position == 1 ~ "Post",
        event_position == 7 ~ "Pre",
        TRUE ~ "Non"
      ),

      image_name = basename(image_path)
    )
}

df_item_task <- map_dfr(item_task_files, load_item_task)

cat("Unique participants:", length(unique(df_item_task$participant_id)), "\n")
table(df_item_task$boundary_position)
summary(df_item_task$rt)
```

```{r}
############################################
# FIND TEST FILES
############################################

item_test_files <- list.files(
  path = item_task_path,
  pattern = "_MST_test_.*\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

cat("Number of ITEM TEST files:", length(item_test_files), "\n")

############################################
# LOAD + CLEAN TEST FILES
############################################

load_item_test <- function(file_path){

  df <- suppressMessages(
    read_csv(file_path, show_col_types = FALSE, name_repair = "unique")
  )

  df %>%
    filter(!is.na(trials.thisN)) %>%
    select(
      image_path,
      trials.thisN,
      trials.key_resp_3.keys,
      trials.key_resp_3.rt,
      position_of_stimuli,
      participant
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      participant_id = participant,
      trial_number = trials.thisN + 1,
      image_name = basename(image_path),

      stimulus_type = case_when(
        str_detect(image_name,"^Foils") ~ "Foil",
        str_detect(image_name,"b\\.jpg$") ~ "Lure",
        str_detect(image_name,"a\\.jpg$") ~ "Target",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),

      response_type = case_when(
        trials.key_resp_3.keys == "o" ~ "Old",
        trials.key_resp_3.keys == "s" ~ "Similar",
        trials.key_resp_3.keys == "n" ~ "New",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    )
}

df_item_test <- map_dfr(item_test_files, load_item_test)

cat("Unique participants:", length(unique(df_item_test$participant_id)), "\n")
table(df_item_test$stimulus_type)
```

```{r}
############################################
# Reaction time by boundary condition
############################################

rt_summary_item <- df_item_task %>%
  group_by(boundary_position) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_rt = mean(rt, na.rm=TRUE),
    sd_rt = sd(rt, na.rm=TRUE),
    n = n()
  )

print(rt_summary_item)

############################################
# Identify trial type
############################################

df_item_task <- df_item_task %>%
  mutate(
    trial_type = case_when(
      str_detect(image_name,"b\\.jpg$") ~ "Lure",
      str_detect(image_name,"a\\.jpg$") ~ "Target",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )
```


```{r}
############################################
# one-way ANOVA
############################################

anova_data_item <- df_item_task %>%
  filter(!is.na(trial_type))

anova_item <- aov(
  rt ~ boundary_position,
  data = df_item_task
)


summary(anova_item)
```

```{r}
############################################
# Participant probabilities
############################################

participant_probs_item <- df_item_test %>%
  group_by(participant_id) %>%
  summarise(

    p_old_target = mean(stimulus_type=="Target" & response_type=="Old"),
    p_old_foil = mean(stimulus_type=="Foil" & response_type=="Old"),

    p_similar_lure = mean(stimulus_type=="Lure" & response_type=="Similar"),
    p_similar_foil = mean(stimulus_type=="Foil" & response_type=="Similar"),

    .groups="drop"
  )

############################################
# Compute REC and LDI
############################################

mst_metrics_item <- participant_probs_item %>%
  mutate(

    REC_item = p_old_target - p_old_foil,

    LDI_item = p_similar_lure - p_similar_foil
  )

print(mst_metrics_item)
```

```{r}
############################################
# Group statistics
############################################

mst_summary_item <- mst_metrics_item %>%
  summarise(

    REC_mean = mean(REC_item),
    REC_sd = sd(REC_item),

    LDI_mean = mean(LDI_item),
    LDI_sd = sd(LDI_item)
  )

print(mst_summary_item)
```

```{r}
############################################
# Join encoding boundary labels
############################################

encoding_lookup_item <- df_item_task %>%
  select(participant_id, image_name, boundary_position)

df_item_test_joined <- df_item_test %>%
  left_join(
    encoding_lookup_item,
    by=c("participant_id","image_name"),
    relationship="many-to-many"
  )

############################################
# Create accuracy columns
############################################

df_item_test_joined <- df_item_test_joined %>%
  mutate(

    lure_correct =
      stimulus_type=="Lure" &
      response_type=="Similar",

    target_hit =
      stimulus_type=="Target" &
      response_type=="Old",

    foil_correct =
      stimulus_type=="Foil" &
      response_type=="New"
  )

############################################
# Compute performance by boundary condition
############################################

boundary_perf_item <- df_item_test_joined %>%
  group_by(participant_id, boundary_position) %>%
  summarise(

    lure_CR = mean(lure_correct, na.rm=TRUE),
    target_hit = mean(target_hit, na.rm=TRUE),

    .groups="drop"
  )

print(boundary_perf_item)
```

```{r}
############################################
# Convert to wide format
############################################

perf_wide_item <- boundary_perf_item %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = boundary_position,
    values_from = c(lure_CR, target_hit)
  )

perf_diff_item <- perf_wide_item %>%
  mutate(

    lure_pre_diff = lure_CR_Pre - lure_CR_Non,
    lure_post_diff = lure_CR_Post - lure_CR_Non,

    target_pre_diff = target_hit_Pre - target_hit_Non,
    target_post_diff = target_hit_Post - target_hit_Non
  )
```

```{r}
############################################
# One-sample t-tests
############################################

t.test(perf_diff_item$lure_pre_diff)

t.test(perf_diff_item$lure_post_diff)

t.test(perf_diff_item$target_pre_diff)

t.test(perf_diff_item$target_post_diff)
```

```{r}
############################################
# Independent t-test
############################################

t.test(
  boundary_perf_item$lure_CR[boundary_perf_item$boundary_position=="Pre"],
  boundary_perf_item$lure_CR[boundary_perf_item$boundary_position=="Post"]
)
```

### Experiment 3: Task Only

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

############################################
# SET PATH
############################################

task_only_base <- "task_only"

task_only_path <- file.path(task_only_base, "task_only_data")

############################################
# FIND TASK FILES
############################################

task_only_task_files <- list.files(
  path = task_only_path,
  pattern = "task.*\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

cat("Number of TASK-ONLY TASK files:", length(task_only_task_files), "\n")

############################################
# LOAD TASK DATA
############################################

load_task_only_task <- function(file_path){

  df <- suppressMessages(
    read_csv(file_path, show_col_types = FALSE, name_repair = "unique")
  )

  participant_id <- substr(basename(file_path),1,5)

  if(!"trials.key_resp_9.rt" %in% names(df)) df$trials.key_resp_9.rt <- NA
  if(!"trials.key_resp_8.rt" %in% names(df)) df$trials.key_resp_8.rt <- NA

  df %>%
    filter(!is.na(trials.thisN)) %>%
    select(image_path,
           trials.thisN,
           trials.key_resp_9.rt,
           trials.key_resp_8.rt) %>%
    mutate(
      participant_id = participant_id,
      trial_number = trials.thisN + 1,

      trials.key_resp_9.rt = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(trials.key_resp_9.rt)),
      trials.key_resp_8.rt = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(trials.key_resp_8.rt)),

      rt = case_when(
        !is.na(trials.key_resp_9.rt) ~ trials.key_resp_9.rt * 1000,
        !is.na(trials.key_resp_8.rt) ~ (3 + trials.key_resp_8.rt) * 1000,
        TRUE ~ NA_real_
      ),

      event_position = ((trial_number-1) %% 7) + 1,

      boundary_position = case_when(
        event_position == 1 ~ "Post",
        event_position == 7 ~ "Pre",
        TRUE ~ "Non"
      ),

      image_name = basename(image_path)
    )
}

df_task_task <- map_dfr(task_only_task_files, load_task_only_task)

cat("Unique participants:", length(unique(df_task_task$participant_id)), "\n")
table(df_task_task$boundary_position)
summary(df_task_task$rt)
```

```{r}
############################################
# FIND TEST FILES
############################################

task_only_test_files <- list.files(
  path = task_only_path,
  pattern = "test.*\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

cat("Number of TASK-ONLY TEST files:", length(task_only_test_files), "\n")

############################################
# LOAD TEST DATA
############################################

load_task_only_test <- function(file_path){

  df <- suppressMessages(
    read_csv(file_path, show_col_types = FALSE, name_repair = "unique")
  )

  df %>%
    filter(!is.na(trials.thisN)) %>%
    select(
      image_path,
      trials.thisN,
      trials.key_resp_3.keys,
      trials.key_resp_3.rt,
      position_of_stimuli,
      participant
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      participant_id = participant,
      trial_number = trials.thisN + 1,
      image_name = basename(image_path),

      stimulus_type = case_when(
        str_detect(image_name,"^Foils") ~ "Foil",
        str_detect(image_name,"b\\.jpg$") ~ "Lure",
        str_detect(image_name,"a\\.jpg$") ~ "Target",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),

      response_type = case_when(
        trials.key_resp_3.keys == "o" ~ "Old",
        trials.key_resp_3.keys == "s" ~ "Similar",
        trials.key_resp_3.keys == "n" ~ "New",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    )
}

df_task_test <- map_dfr(task_only_test_files, load_task_only_test)

cat("Unique participants:", length(unique(df_task_test$participant_id)), "\n")
table(df_task_test$stimulus_type)
```

```{r}
############################################
# Reaction time by boundary condition
############################################

rt_summary_task <- df_task_task %>%
  group_by(boundary_position) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_rt = mean(rt, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_rt = sd(rt, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n()
  )

print(rt_summary_task)
```

```{r}
############################################
# One-way ANOVA
############################################

df_task_task <- df_task_task %>%
  mutate(boundary_position = factor(boundary_position))

anova_task <- aov(
  rt ~ boundary_position,
  data = df_task_task
)

summary(anova_task)
```

```{r}
############################################
# Participant probabilities
############################################

participant_probs_task <- df_task_test %>%
  group_by(participant_id) %>%
  summarise(

    p_old_target = mean(stimulus_type == "Target" & response_type == "Old"),

    p_old_foil = mean(stimulus_type == "Foil" & response_type == "Old"),

    p_similar_lure = mean(stimulus_type == "Lure" & response_type == "Similar"),

    p_similar_foil = mean(stimulus_type == "Foil" & response_type == "Similar"),

    .groups = "drop"
  )

```

```{r}
############################################
# REC and LDI
############################################

mst_metrics_task <- participant_probs_task %>%
  mutate(

    REC_task = p_old_target - p_old_foil,

    LDI_task = p_similar_lure - p_similar_foil
  )

print(mst_metrics_task)

############################################
# Group summary
############################################

mst_summary_task <- mst_metrics_task %>%
  summarise(

    REC_mean = mean(REC_task),
    REC_sd = sd(REC_task),

    LDI_mean = mean(LDI_task),
    LDI_sd = sd(LDI_task)
  )

print(mst_summary_task)
```

```{r}
############################################
# Join encoding boundary info
############################################

encoding_lookup_task <- df_task_task %>%
  select(participant_id, image_name, boundary_position)

df_task_test_joined <- df_task_test %>%
  left_join(
    encoding_lookup_task,
    by = c("participant_id", "image_name"),
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  )

############################################
# Accuracy labels
############################################

df_task_test_joined <- df_task_test_joined %>%
  mutate(

    lure_correct =
      stimulus_type == "Lure" &
      response_type == "Similar",

    target_hit =
      stimulus_type == "Target" &
      response_type == "Old",

    foil_correct =
      stimulus_type == "Foil" &
      response_type == "New"
  )

############################################
# Performance by boundary condition
############################################

boundary_perf_task <- df_task_test_joined %>%
  group_by(participant_id, boundary_position) %>%
  summarise(

    lure_CR = mean(lure_correct, na.rm = TRUE),

    target_hit = mean(target_hit, na.rm = TRUE),

    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(boundary_perf_task)
```

```{r}
############################################
# Convert to wide format
############################################

perf_wide_task <- boundary_perf_task %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = boundary_position,
    values_from = c(lure_CR, target_hit)
  )

perf_diff_task <- perf_wide_task %>%
  mutate(

    lure_pre_diff = lure_CR_Pre - lure_CR_Non,
    lure_post_diff = lure_CR_Post - lure_CR_Non,

    target_pre_diff = target_hit_Pre - target_hit_Non,
    target_post_diff = target_hit_Post - target_hit_Non
  )
```

```{r}
############################################
# One-sample t-tests
############################################

t.test(perf_diff_task$lure_pre_diff)

t.test(perf_diff_task$lure_post_diff)

t.test(perf_diff_task$target_pre_diff)

t.test(perf_diff_task$target_post_diff)
```

```{r}
############################################
# Pre vs Post comparison
############################################

t.test(
  boundary_perf_task$lure_CR[
    boundary_perf_task$boundary_position == "Pre"
  ],
  boundary_perf_task$lure_CR[
    boundary_perf_task$boundary_position == "Post"
  ]
)
```
